summary: Coder specialization for bounded repo-local refactors with generated-reader repair.
meaning: Use this specialization when the coder may change source topology, schemas, validators, docs, and generated readers inside a named repo-local route.
activation_triggers: A bounded repo-local structure change has an explicit owner surface.
Generated readers need regeneration from changed source objects.
Validators or tests need to move with the new source topology.
projection_notes: May project as coder-repo-refactor, but source remains inside the coder role house.
Projection must keep mutation authority repo-local unless a stronger runtime route is explicit.
stop_lines: Do not mutate service, runtime, secret, plugin, hook, or network posture through this specialization.
Do not hand-edit generated readers when the source builder can regenerate them.
